message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for signing, hostcall channels, and threshold schemes

signature_preimage.rs (+171 lines):
  Tests for unsigned-view encoding with deterministic field ordering, keyed
  hashing for security-critical objects, schema-hash prefix and domain
  separation tags. Validates preimage construction, canonical ordering, and
  collision resistance for different object types.

session_hostcall_channel.rs (+180 lines):
  Session-authenticated hostcall channel tests: monotonic sequence enforcement,
  authenticated backpressure signaling, amortized asymmetric authentication via
  deterministic handshake. Serde roundtrips for SharedPayloadDescriptor,
  BackpressureSignal, ChannelPayload variants, and SessionConfig.

threshold_signing.rs (+308 lines):
  k-of-n threshold signing scheme tests for emergency operations (key
  revocation, rotation, authority-set changes). Validates sorted signature set
  construction, ShareHolderId display formatting with hex prefix/zero handling,
  ThresholdScope serde roundtrips, and threshold verification with insufficient
  and sufficient signer counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
